name: Jiajiayue Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiajiayue Group Co., Ltd. engages in the operation of supermarkets businesses in People's Republic of China. Its products include maternal and child supplies, international beauty products, health supplies, and digital products; cosmetics, such as facial skin care beauty products, fragrances, beauty tools, and personal care products; baby products comprising maternal food products, diapers/wet wipes, baby supplies, and baby care products; water and drink, milk dairy, alcohol, tea, and coffee products; kitchen seasonings, easy to eat products, edible oils, and north and south dry goods; towels, underwear products, socks, home and bed beddings, kitchen utensils, water shaving razors, hair dryers, and small appliances; paper products, clothing cleaning products, kitchen cleaning products, and cleaning tools; and fruits/seafood products. The company was founded in 1981 and is based in Weihai, the People's Republic of China. Jiajiayue Group Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Jiajiayue Holding Group Co., Ltd.
